description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: build-linux-macos and build-windows. The build-linux-macos job runs on ubuntu-latest and macos-latest, and the build-windows job runs on windows-latest. Both jobs depend on a prelude job that generates a build matrix based on the GitHub reference. The jobs install dependencies, build, package, and test GDL, and upload build artifacts.
